name: Hua Tuo (Yuanhua)
page_title: Hua Tuo (Yuanhua) 華佗 (元化) – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Did not meet with or heal Guan Yu.
	Died in AD 207 not AD 220, and not because he tried to assassinate Cao Cao. Rather, he was making excuses to avoid treating him. At one point he returned home, claiming his wife was ill. Cao Cao investigated, found it to be false, and had him imprisoned and later executed.

full_text:
Hua Tuo (Yuanhua) 華佗 (元化)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua Tuo (華佗), styledYuanhua (元化), was born in Qiao, State of Pei. A famous doctor from the Three Kingdoms period. Killed trying to avoid treating Cao Cao. Hua Tuo lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
